findings.finding: Deal and PostgreSQL-backed command path exist; new crop work must extend this authority.
Domain value objects use bigint/fixed precision, but legacy Deal, Shipment, Lab and Dispute fields still include Float. New crop models must not add Float and need a migration plan.
Culture/class/GOST are flat Deal fields; no versioned profile lifecycle, indicator schema or pinned profile hash was found.
No Field, CropSeason, HarvestBatch or split/merge/blend mass genealogy authority found.
State-machine logic exists in several layers, while persisted Deal still exposes a primary flat status. A single server projection and migration contract are required.
Versioning and signature references exist; full MChD validity matrix, legal message workflow and regulated document requirements remain slice-specific.
Shipment/checkpoint/GPS and an offline-oriented driver UX are present, but canonical encrypted device queue, slot capacity, weighing provenance and conflict-safe sync require completion.
LabSample, LabTest and evidence tables exist; custody transfers, accreditation snapshot, methods/qualifiers, raw instrument provenance and manifest authority are incomplete.
Payment and ledger foundations exist; bank-neutral adapter SPI, signed callbacks, obligations/reserve/release separation and real reconciliation evidence remain required.
Dispute, hold and evidence foundations exist; expertise conflict checks, structured decision schema, appeal and export manifest need implementation.
Generic integration/outbox foundations exist; capability/version registry, protocol-specific durable ACK, schema drift quarantine and machine-readable live status are not complete.
TЗ identifies protocol materials, but exact source bundle hash/access, crypto boundary and provider credentials must be reverified before regulated activation.

The product already communicates what happens, money, cargo, documents and blockers; authenticated role homes still need one consistent priority-queue and Deal workspace contract for all crop archetypes.
A separate governed AI contour exists; PC-CROP must expose only safe read/prepared actions and must not couple crop authority to model availability.
Evidence-governance patterns exist, but crop expansion has no exact-release load/DR/legal/external-provider evidence yet. Operational status remains NOT_ATTESTED.

critical_next_actions: Implement PC-CROP-01 without Float or crop-specific Deal authority
Create server projection truth table for Deal dimensions
Reverify FGIS Grain source bundle and legal activation dependencies
Keep UI work inside the UX contract and existing design system
